features.featureTitle: Build the Admin Panel frontend with a protected login screen (username/password). After login, provide navigation to three sections: (1) Cattle Management — table listing all cattle with tag number, breed, date of purchase, milking capacity, purchase price, availability, health status, and action buttons for add/edit/delete; (2) Customer Management — table listing all customers with name, phone, address, active/inactive status toggle, and add/edit/delete actions; (3) Orders & Deliveries — table of all orders with customer name, cattle tag, order date, status, and ability to update delivery status.

Build the Customer Portal frontend at /portal with a username/password login form. After successful login, show two tabs: (1) Place Order — allows the customer to submit a new order by selecting available cattle (shown by tag number and breed) and entering delivery notes; (2) My Deliveries — lists the customer's own orders with status badges (Pending, Confirmed, Out for Delivery, Delivered, Cancelled) and delivery notes. Block access entirely for inactive or non-existent customer accounts and show a clear 'Access denied' message.

Apply a consistent visual theme across both the Admin Panel and Customer Portal: use a clean, professional green-and-white color palette with earthy accent tones, clear typography, and card-based layouts. Admin panel should feel authoritative and data-dense; customer portal should feel friendly and simple.
